NiftiArray 0.99.6.1
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • NiftiArray: Fast Random Access of NIfTI Objects
  • Changelog

Dump a NIfTI header

Source: R/seed_methods.R, R/zzz_ReshapedNiftiArray-class.R
nifti_header.Rd

Extracts the contents of a NIfTI header, from a NIfTI file on disk or a NiftiArray object loaded into R.

nifti_header(image)

# S4 method for NiftiArray
nifti_header(image)

# S4 method for NiftiArrayList
nifti_header(image)

# S4 method for DelayedArray
nifti_header(image)

# S4 method for HDF5Array
nifti_header(image)

# S4 method for HDF5ArraySeed
nifti_header(image)

# S4 method for ANY
nifti_header(image)

# S4 method for NiftiArraySeed
nifti_header(image)

# S4 method for ReshapedNiftiArray
nifti_header(image)

# S4 method for ReshapedNiftiArraySeed
nifti_header(image)

Arguments

image

A file path to a NIfTI image on disk or a NiftiArray object loaded locally in R.

Value

A list of class niftiHeader, which has the NIfTI header information.

Examples

nii_fname = system.file("extdata",
"example.nii.gz", package = "RNifti")
nifti_header(nii_fname)
#> NIfTI-1 header
#>     sizeof_hdr: 348
#>       dim_info: 0
#>            dim: 3  96  96  60  1  1  1  1
#>      intent_p1: 0
#>      intent_p2: 0
#>      intent_p3: 0
#>    intent_code: 0 (Unknown)
#>       datatype: 4 (INT16)
#>         bitpix: 16
#>    slice_start: 0
#>         pixdim: -1.0  2.5  2.5  2.5  0.0  0.0  0.0  0.0
#>     vox_offset: 352
#>      scl_slope: 1
#>      scl_inter: 0
#>      slice_end: 0
#>     slice_code: 0 (Unknown)
#>     xyzt_units: 10
#>        cal_max: 2503
#>        cal_min: 0
#> slice_duration: 0
#>        toffset: 0
#>        descrip: TractoR NIfTI writer v3.0.0
#>       aux_file: 
#>     qform_code: 2 (Aligned Anat)
#>     sform_code: 2 (Aligned Anat)
#>      quatern_b: 0
#>      quatern_c: 1
#>      quatern_d: 0
#>      qoffset_x: 122.0339
#>      qoffset_y: -95.18523
#>      qoffset_z: -55.03814
#>         srow_x: -2.5000  0.0000  0.0000  122.0339
#>         srow_y: 0.00000  2.50000  0.00000  -95.18523
#>         srow_z: 0.00000  0.00000  2.50000  -55.03814
#>    intent_name: 
#>          magic: n+1
#>     extendible: FALSE
res = writeNiftiArray(nii_fname)
nifti_header(res)
#> NIfTI-1 header
#>     sizeof_hdr: 348
#>       dim_info: 0
#>            dim: 3  96  96  60  1  1  1  1
#>      intent_p1: 0
#>      intent_p2: 0
#>      intent_p3: 0
#>    intent_code: 0
#>       datatype: 8
#>         bitpix: 32
#>    slice_start: 0
#>         pixdim: -1.0  2.5  2.5  2.5  0.0  0.0  0.0  0.0
#>     vox_offset: 352
#>      scl_slope: 0
#>      scl_inter: 0
#>      slice_end: 0
#>     slice_code: 0
#>     xyzt_units: 10
#>        cal_max: 2503
#>        cal_min: 0
#> slice_duration: 0
#>        toffset: 0
#>        descrip: TractoR NIfTI writer v3.0.0
#>       aux_file: 
#>     qform_code: 2
#>     sform_code: 2
#>      quatern_b: 0
#>      quatern_c: 1
#>      quatern_d: 0
#>      qoffset_x: 122.0339
#>      qoffset_y: -95.18523
#>      qoffset_z: -55.03814
#>         srow_x: -2.5000  0.0000  0.0000  122.0339
#>         srow_y: 0.00000  2.50000  0.00000  -95.18523
#>         srow_z: 0.00000  0.00000  2.50000  -55.03814
#>    intent_name: 
#>          magic: n+1
#>     extendible: FALSE
